jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Neuland Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!
